notes:
chuẩn usually means standard or correct/right. It describes something that meets a rule, level, or expectation.

As an adjective, it goes after linking verbs (là, rất) or before nouns in casual speech to mean “spot on” or “exact.” It can describe behavior, style, answers, quality, or measurements. In spoken Vietnamese, chuẩn! alone can mean “Exactly!” or “That’s right.”

Close to đúng, chính xác (accurate); opposite of sai (wrong).

definitions.en: A standard or criterion used for comparison.
definitions.vi: Một tiêu chuẩn hoặc tiêu chí được sử dụng để so sánh.
definitions.es: Un estándar o criterio utilizado para la comparación.

example.vi: Đây là một bài kiểm tra chuẩn.

exampleSentences: Bài kiểm tra này cần làm theo chuẩn của trường.
Anh ấy luôn ăn mặc rất chuẩn khi đi làm.
Em muốn biết chuẩn để viết email công việc như thế nào.
notes_md:
**chuẩn** usually means *standard* or *correct/right*. It describes something that meets a rule, level, or expectation.

As an adjective, it goes after linking verbs (là, rất) or before nouns in casual speech to mean “spot on” or “exact.” It can describe behavior, style, answers, quality, or measurements. In spoken Vietnamese, **chuẩn!** alone can mean “Exactly!” or “That’s right.”

Close to **đúng**, **chính xác** (accurate); opposite of **sai** (wrong).
exampleSentencesTranslated: This test needs to be done according to the school standard.
He always dresses very standard when going to work.
I want to know the standard for writing work emails.
